text: Cloud Code #26 — assemble the finished 9:16 vertical short for Douyin. FULL BRIEF + all assets are at ~/shared-review/code26/BRIEF.md (read it). Summary: 9:16 1080x1920 like our Amazon video; keep source_screenrec.mov UNCROPPED in-frame (Safari desktop look is intentional); captions BOTTOM only in Douyin-safe zone using NotoSansSC-Bold.otf, text 'Cloud Code 挑战 · 100 个项目 · 第 26 个' then 'vibe coding · Spline 3D' (no 工作室落地页 line, no top-left tag); audio = 文天 VO at warroom tasks/T-026/out/wentian_26b_norm.mp3 (Karen rendering now, pull latest main) on top + robot_sfx_subtle.wav low + music_bed.mp3 at ~20%, don't drown the voice. Deliver ~/shared-review/code26/code26_final.mp4 then bin/warroom-say '[Dali] done: code26_final.mp4'.
